prompt: What is 12 divided by 4? Answer with the number only.

metadata.why: easy IRT anchor; almost everyone passes

prompt: What is 13 times 7? Answer with the number only.

metadata.why: mid IRT anchor for the ability scale

prompt: Compute the remainder when 2^20 is divided by 1000. Answer with the number only.

metadata.why: hard IRT anchor; spreads the top of the scale
metadata.source: ATLAS / Adaptive Testing (Peiyu Li et al. 2025, arXiv:2511.04689)
